content:
铛铛~铛铛~开往「祈岁节」的列车🚂即将到站——
弥萨格大学的守密人们，一起来庆贺新春🎆 吧！

由守密人们自发倾力组织的**同人作品展「2026忘却前夜新春会」**将于2月14日晚在Bilibili平台直播放送！！！
除了掉落银芯兑换码，直播间还会有随机周边抽奖环节。我们倾情邀请大家前往参与这场同人盛会🥳~
🔹 直播时间：<t:1771068600:f>
🔹 直播平台：Bilibili @弥萨格大学祈岁节分线
🔹 直播链接：https://b23.tv/5846AkQ
在此，感谢每一位为「2026忘却前夜新春会」付出的守密人！预祝直播圆满，也提前祝大家新年快乐~

<:Alva_goodjob:1468259169965707398> 主办方拥有本活动最终解释权。银芯兑换码由《忘却前夜》官方赞助。

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Morimens Spring Festival Gala

Ding-dong! Ding-dong! 🚂 The train bound for the Spring Festival is about to arrive at the station—
Keepers of Mythag University, let’s come together to celebrate the Chinese New Year🎆 !

The fan-made "2026 Morimens Spring Festival Gala," organized with great passion by Keepers, will be broadcast live on Bilibili on the evening of February 14th!!!
In addition to Silver redemption code, there will be random merchandise giveaways during the livestream. We cordially invite everyone to join us for this show! 🥳
🔹 Livestream Time: <t:1771068600:f>
🔹 Platform: Bilibili @弥萨格大学祈岁节分线
🔹 Airing Link: https://b23.tv/5846AkQ
We would like to express our gratitude to every Keeper who contributed to the "2026 Morimens Spring Festival Gala"! We wish for a successful broadcast and a very Happy New Year to everyone in advance~

<:Alva_goodjob:1468259169965707398> The organizer reserves the right of final interpretation for this event.Redemption Code is officially sponsored by BIAV Studio.
